description: M-26-14 Element 3: Extracts Appendix B category from kibana.alert.rule.tags and denormalizes to m_26_14.category for ML datafeed partitioning.

_meta.m_26_14_description: Scans kibana.alert.rule.tags for a tag matching 'Cat-[A-K]' pattern and writes it to m_26_14.category as a keyword field. Required by the m_26_14-ml-element3-rule-silence ML datafeed which partitions alert counts by m_26_14.category. Apply via index.final_pipeline on .alerts-security.* or run as a Kibana connector/Watcher that enriches alerts post-write.
_meta.m_26_14_note: Cannot be applied as a default_pipeline on .alerts-security.* (system-managed). Apply as final_pipeline or use a Watcher/enrich processor to backfill existing alerts.

script.description: Extract M-26-14 Appendix B category tag (Cat-A through Cat-K) from rule tags array
